title: RAF Typhoon declares mid-air emergency during training flight

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: RAF Typhoon declares mid-air emergency during training flight. The Typhoon, which had been operating out of RAF Lossiemouth in Moray, encountered a flight control issue at about 12:20.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – RAF Typhoon declares mid-air emergency during training flight
